tools.name: import_mesh
tools.description:
Import a static or skeletal mesh from an FBX file into the project.

Supported formats: FBX (recommended), OBJ (static mesh only).
For animation-only FBX imports, use import_animation_fbx instead.

After import:
  - Use set_component_properties to assign the mesh to a StaticMeshComponent or SkeletalMeshComponent
  - Use configure_static_mesh to set LOD generation, Nanite, and collision
  - Use search_assets to find the created asset path

Naming conventions:
  - Static meshes: SM_ prefix (e.g. SM_Rock, SM_Table)
  - Skeletal meshes: SK_ prefix (e.g. SK_HeroChar, SK_Enemy)

source_file.description: Absolute path to the FBX or OBJ file on disk, e.g. C:/Assets/SM_Rock.fbx

destination_path.description: Content folder for the imported mesh asset, e.g. /Game/Meshes/Environment

asset_name.description: Name for the created mesh asset, e.g. SM_Rock. If omitted, uses the filename.

import_as_skeletal.description: If true, import as SkeletalMesh (SK_) rather than StaticMesh (SM_). Default: false.

tools.name: import_assets_batch
tools.description:
Import multiple asset files in a single batch operation.

More efficient than multiple import_mesh calls for large asset sets.
All assets import to the same destination_path folder.

Supported file types in the same batch: FBX, OBJ, PNG, TGA, WAV, MP3.

source_files.description: List of absolute file paths to import

items.description: Absolute path to a file on disk

destination_path.description: Content folder for all imported assets, e.g. /Game/ImportedAssets

tools.name: configure_static_mesh
tools.description:
Configure post-import settings on a Static Mesh asset:
  - LOD generation (automatic or manually specified count)
  - Nanite enable/disable (UE5 only)
  - Collision complexity
  - Lightmap resolution

Call after import_mesh or when you need to change an existing mesh's settings.

Nanite is recommended for high-poly hero assets (>100k triangles).
Do NOT enable Nanite on meshes used in particle systems, water, or instanced foliage — use LODs instead.

LOD reduction:
  - auto: engine generates LODs automatically based on triangle reduction
  - manual: specify lod_count
  - none: single LOD (for UI meshes, simple primitives)

asset_path.description: Content path of the Static Mesh asset to configure

enable_nanite.description: Enable Nanite virtualized geometry (UE5 only). Recommended for high-poly static assets.

lod_generation.description: LOD generation mode: 'auto' (engine generates), 'manual' (use lod_count), 'none' (single LOD). Default: 'auto'

lod_count.description: Number of LODs to generate when lod_generation='manual'. Typical: 3-4.

lightmap_resolution.description: Lightmap UV resolution in texels (power of 2: 64, 128, 256, 512, 1024). Higher = better quality baked lighting but more memory.
